admin_settings.chat_widget_info_4: When disabled, the chat widget is hidden for all users
admin_settings.confirm_hide_chat: Hide all chat widget messages from users? Data will be retained in the database but hidden from users.

admin_settings.confirm_text_invalid: Confirmation text is incorrect. Please enter RESET.

admin_settings.danger_zone_desc: Hide all chat widget messages from users. Data is retained in the database but hidden from users.
admin_settings.danger_zone_info: Actual data is not deleted. Administrators can still access it in the database.
admin_settings.db_reset_error: An error occurred during DB reset.
admin_settings.db_reset_info: A confirmation modal will appear to prevent mistakes. You must type RESET to proceed.
admin_settings.db_schema_fix_desc: Fixes models table columns to the latest schema in frontend-only deployment environments. (e.g., api_config, api_key, app_error_logs)
admin_settings.free_board_desc: Show the free board menu in the sidebar.
admin_settings.full_reset: Full Reset (core tables like users/settings are preserved)
admin_settings.history_hide_failed: Failed to hide history from users.
admin_settings.image_analysis_model_desc: Select the Vision model for image analysis. This model is used when images are uploaded.
admin_settings.image_analysis_prompt_desc: This prompt is automatically used when an image is sent without text.
admin_settings.image_settings_saved: Image upload settings have been saved.
admin_settings.init_schema_desc: Creates all tables at once in a new DB (e.g., modol_dev). Existing tables are not modified; only missing tables are created.
admin_settings.login_display_desc: Display support contact card at the bottom-right of the login screen.
admin_settings.login_redirect_desc: Sets the default login page for unauthenticated users.
admin_settings.max_images_hint: Maximum number of images that can be uploaded at once. (1-20)
admin_settings.page_description: Manage system settings. Each section can be saved individually.
admin_settings.placeholder_info_desc: → Automatically replaced with the user's selected API key.
admin_settings.profile_edit_desc: Show the profile edit menu in the sidebar. Can be disabled in SSO environments.
admin_settings.question_length_desc: Prevents unlimited or abnormally large input.
admin_settings.question_length_saved: Question length limit has been saved.
admin_settings.room_name_model_desc: Model used to automatically generate room names based on conversation content when creating a new room. A lightweight text model is recommended.
admin_settings.room_name_saved: Room name generation settings have been saved.
admin_settings.schema_create_error: An error occurred during schema creation.

admin_settings.tooltip_message_hint: {length}/100 chars - Displayed on each page visit. Hidden for the session when X is clicked.
admin_settings.vscode_config_hint: Placeholders are replaced with actual values when user selects model and key. Leave empty for default example.

admin_settings.warning_partial_reset: Selected table data will be permanently deleted.
